prompt: Help me plan my next four weeks as founder of Reveal.
method: constitution-bound expand simulation (same packs/contracts/evidence as forge expand-node; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)

nodes.label: Meaning of this season
nodes.details: These four weeks are about making Reveal feel like a home, not proving a feature factory.

nodes.label: Founder posture check
nodes.details: Weekly ask: did we deepen trust and belonging, or only ship chrome?

nodes.label: Guard the access promise
nodes.details: This month refuses paywall theater while the founding promise still prioritizes access.

nodes.label: Hustle without formation
nodes.details: A packed calendar that never tastes the member journey makes the mission hollow.

nodes.label: Collect one witness story
nodes.details: End of month: one real story of a woman feeling safer talking about money.
